## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, article publishing, and SEO improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content publishing location clarified: articles should be under "Data Engineering Resources", not the main blog](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Targeting 10 articles/week: 7 refreshes, 3 new topics (70-30 split) to balance quick wins and new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [SEO focus: address conversion drops, traffic declines, and content gaps; include Airbyte-specific CTAs in articles](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Reporting: Looker Studio dashboard for new content, Surfer SEO reports for refreshes to track improvements](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing and Organization

  - [Articles mistakenly published on main blog instead of "Data Engineering Resources" section](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [No 301 redirects needed as articles weren't indexed yet](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Future articles to be published directly in the correct section](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Tables in content: team to provide guidance on proper implementation](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

### Content Strategy and Volume

  - [Targeting 10 articles per week: 7 refreshes, 3 new topics (70-30 split)](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Focus on refreshing high-priority pages first, especially those with conversion or traffic drops](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [New content needed for areas lacking, such as AI-related data integration](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)

### SEO Improvements and Priorities

  - [Refresh articles with conversion drops, rank drops, and traffic declines](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Conduct content gap analysis to identify improvement areas](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Include Airbyte-specific calls-to-action (CTAs) in articles, especially at the end](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Update publishing dates for refreshed articles](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### Reporting and Metrics

  - [Looker Studio dashboard for tracking new content performance](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Surfer SEO reports for before/after metrics on refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Monthly analysis of traffic and rank drops to inform refresh priorities](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)

### Link Building

  - [Jakub offered to review current link-building efforts and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Nithin to share current link-building strategies in Slack for review](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review the product-oriented blog post provided; if approved, three more to be delivered by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Examine completed refreshes in the shared folder](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [Decide on exact number of refreshes vs. new articles for next week (leaning towards 70-30 split)](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Share feedback on all reviewed content](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Nithin to share link-building strategies in Slack for Jakub's review](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [David to follow up in Slack channel with detailed next steps](https://fathom.video/share/SAc4iMrqxs-y6Bx9MTf6SGwXS-6SU8uE?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
